candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line and the most specific reported sales label.
Also a revenue total and appears identical to the main revenue line; useful as fallback if label changes by year.
Section/header, not the actual populated revenue line.

variables.notes: Using revenue lines as a priority list, not to be summed.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales style line; standard COGS mapping.
Direct production input cost component, but narrower than total cost of revenue.

candidates.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility - Unclassified
candidates.why: Subcomponent/detail of material expenses rather than the broadest COGS line.
Inventory adjustment component only, not total COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the broad direct cost line rather than narrower material-only components.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and semantically the best overhead measure; per rule, prefer explicit SG&A row only.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Valid SG&A component, but should not be preferred when an explicit SG&A row exists.
Too broad and includes COGS/other operating items, so not preferred for SG&A.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists, so selected only that row. It already excludes R&D by label.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental
candidates.why: Dedicated R&D label exists, but appears as a supplemental/header-style line with no visible values.
Dedicated R&D label exists, but no visible values in preview.
Section/header rather than a populated expense line.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated populated R&D expense line is identifiable. Selected SG&A row explicitly excludes R&D, so XRD is left empty rather than inferred.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best recurring interest-expense line and preferable to broader net financing totals.
Also a clean interest expense line; useful if label changes.
Too broad/net and includes non-interest finance items, so not preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Used specific recurring interest expense and excluded broader net financing rows to avoid mixing in non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes minority interest, which is ideal for BE.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-only equity line; strong fallback if label changes.
Also appears to match parent equity here and excludes minority interest based on values.
Another equivalent common equity label that matches parent equity values.
Likely equity-related fallback, but less standard than attributable-to-parent equity.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list of parent/common equity labels to capture reporting-label changes while excluding minority interest.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest line.
Equivalent minority interest label and good fallback if naming changes.
Income statement allocation line, not book minority interest on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Priority list of balance-sheet minority interest labels; not to be summed.
